ticket.subject: Incorrect charge of $349 applied - should be $79 Starter plan only
ticket.body: I was billed $349 in March, but our account clearly shows the Starter tier at $79/month. The invoice lists unexpected charges: 'API requests overage $120', 'Premium support addon $80', and 'Data retention upgrade $70'. We haven't authorized any of these add-ons or upgrades. Can you explain why these appeared or process a refund for the overcharge?
